g.text: High School Story - Hexagonal Architecture Framework
translates external intent to Application API
file system / audio / clock / content source
binds Application projection to Godot view
Dependencies cross into Core through ports.
Core contains Application; Application contains Domain.
Domain is plain C# canonical gameplay truth.
No Godot, no R3, no JSON, no Ports, no logging.
Presenters do not query Domain directly and do not mutate GameState.
